title: HenryNdubuaku/maths-cs-ai-compendium
friendlyTitle: A big learning guide for AI and machine learning
summary: This fast-rising TypeScript repository is a structured compendium for aspiring AI and machine-learning research engineers, covering mathematics, computer science, machine learning, vision, speech, autonomous systems and production software engineering. It had about 5.7k stars at review time and was the leading AI-related project in the day’s GitHub Trending collection.
friendlySummary: This popular GitHub project collects lessons on maths, coding and AI topics for people who want to become AI or machine-learning engineers.
whyItMatters: Use it as a curriculum map when you need to strengthen the foundations behind AI work rather than only learn individual tools. Its chapter structure can help turn a sprawling study plan into a sequence of topics and exercises.
friendlyWhyItMatters: You can use it to make a clear study plan and learn the basics behind AI tools.
